name: Cream Cheese Swirl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate and 3 tablespoons butter in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts. Set aside to cool.
2. Cream together 2 tablespoons butter and cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add 1 egg, 1 tablespoon flour, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla. Set aside.
3. Beat the remaining 2 eggs on medium speed of an electric mixer until thick and lemon-colored. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, beating well. Combine 1/2 cup flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into egg mixture, mixing well. Stir in cooled chocolate, vanilla, almond extract, and chopped pecans or walnuts.
4. Pour half of the chocolate batter into a greased 8-inch square pan. Spread with cheese mixture; top with remaining chocolate batter. Cut through the mixture in the pan with a knife to create a marbled effect.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes. Cool on a wire rack; cut into squares.
